name: Martian Chess
author: Andrew Looney (Looney Labs / Icehouse) / AGP port
description: Martian Chess (Andrew Looney, an Icehouse/Looney-Pyramids game) on a 4x8 board split into two 4x4 zones by a canal. Color means nothing: you move whatever pieces are currently in YOUR zone. Pawns step one square diagonally, Drones slide 1-2 orthogonally, Queens slide any distance orthogonally or diagonally. Capturing a piece scores its value (Pawn 1, Drone 2, Queen 3) and crossing the canal hands your piece to the opponent. The game ends the instant one zone is empty; highest score wins.
